response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely aligning with the role's primary stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, alongside measurable impact in high-throughput environments. His entrepreneurial and open-source contributions further highlight his initiative and technical depth.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial initiatives
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though likely transferable from Node.js)
Broad but varied tech stack may dilute depth in some secondary technologies
No explicit cloud platform preference (AWS/GCP/Azure) mentioned
